title: Student Academic Standings
description: The calculated academic standings of students.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the student academic standing.

student.title: Student
student.description: The student associated with the academic standing.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Student.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of academic standing calculation used to determine the student academic standing (e.g. level, program, academicPeriod).

level.title: Level
level.description: The academic level associated with the student academic standing.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Level.

program.title: Program
program.description: The academic program associated with the student academic standing.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Program.

academicPeriod.title: Academic Period
academicPeriod.description: The academic period associated with the student academic standing.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Period.

standing.title: Standing
standing.description: The academic standing calculated for the student.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Standing.

overrideStanding.title: Override Standing
overrideStanding.description: A manually entered override of the calculated academic standing.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Override Standing.

overrideReason.title: Override Reason
overrideReason.description: The reason the calculated academic standing was overridden.
